rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF EDUARDA O. BUTAC
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #2, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 08/28/2023, pending a disposition of the related heirship petition. The following issues have not been addressed since the initial hearing on 12/12/2022: 1) No courtesy copy of the petition has been received. 2) No proposed order has been received. 3) No original statements of the bank accounts listed on Schedule F have been filed. See LRSF 14.34(D). 4) A copy of the petition must be served on the person who requested special notice. Item 5 of the proof of service attached to the DE-120 form must be checked. See Probate Code section 1252(a). 5) A copy of the remote appearance information required by LRSF 14.1(D)(6) must be attached to and served with the DE-120 form. 6) Please file a copy of the closing escrow statement for the sale of the estate real property.

rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE GARFIELD 1990 REVOCABLE TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Order Approving Compromise Of Litigation
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 09/11/2023 (no earlier available). The following issues must be addressed: 1) Re Morton Garfield: i) Please provide his date of death. ii) If he survived Zalmon, the personal representative of Morton's estate must be identified and receive notice. Please also provide a copy of letters issued to the personal representative. If no probate administration is pending or anticipated, an allegation must be made as to whether Morton died testate or instate, and all devisees (if testate) and heirs (if intestate) must be identified and receive notice. If intestate, an allegation must also be made as to whether Morton was survived by a spouse or registered domestic partner. Section 17203(c) & CRC 7.51(e). iii) If Morton's specific gift has already been made, a copy of a signed receipt can be filed in lieu of a proof of service of notice. Sections 1206(b) & 17100.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF RAY MOISANT
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Appearance required. Issues to include: Petitioner requests that real property located at 1084-1086 Geneva Ave, San Francisco be distributed 100% to herself, despite alleging that all assets are Decedent's separate property. A notarized letter written by Decedent is attached to the petition, which states Decedent's intent to add Petitioner to the title as joint tenant. Points and Authorities was filed on 5/22/23. Remote appearances should be made whenever possible. Please review Local Rule 14.1. The following information pertains to appearances by Zoom: WHEN ENTERING "YOUR NAME" ON ZOOM, BOTH THE FIRST AND LAST NAME, AS WELL THE CASE NUMBER, MUST BE INCLUDED.
